//: Type-check gate for the decoupled console app (src/**/*.ts). esbuild does the actual compilation (strips types, no checking); this drives `pnpm run typecheck`. Same shape as the website's TS gate, standalone.
//paths: The shared DOM-free search engine (libs/textsearch) is consumed as source, not an npm package: the paths alias maps @magus/textsearch straight to its entry module so tsc resolves the import for the type-check gate. esbuild honors the same tsconfig paths when it bundles from this project cwd, so the build inlines the source too (the lib has zero npm deps, so cross-dir resolution is clean); NO pnpm workspace.
